research_question: After round8 and two mixed composability screens showed that standalone positive edge is insufficient for safe family promotion, which six mechanism-orthogonal atomic price-volume signals can improve the odds of passing the composability hard gate under the frozen v18 operational contract?

discovery_contract.builder_rule: each candidate builder may rank exactly one raw signal field and may not combine multiple raw signals inside the same candidate
discovery_contract.source_inspiration_rule: candidate definitions may draw inspiration from Alpha158-style atomic expressions and common price-volume paper mechanisms, but every field must be implemented independently inside this project and must not rely on the neighboring qlib adapter stack

signal_pool.interpretation: persistent positive overnight return bias as an overnight-session drift mechanism distinct from intraday drift and close-to-close momentum

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This tests close-to-next-open drift rather than open-to-close drift.

signal_pool.interpretation: higher average gap-fill rate as a gap-handling quality mechanism distinct from pure gap frequency

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This focuses on how gaps are repaired rather than how often downside gaps occur.

signal_pool.interpretation: stronger lower-shadow support as a downside-absorption microstructure mechanism distinct from generic recovery averages

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This isolates intraday lower-tail support rather than broad weak-day close positioning.

signal_pool.interpretation: lower downside semivol ratio as a tail-risk balance mechanism distinct from total volatility level

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This uses downside-vs-total volatility composition instead of tail magnitude alone.

signal_pool.interpretation: faster volume normalization after down days as a participation-recovery mechanism distinct from amount-shock level displacement

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This tests conditional recovery dynamics after down days, not unconditional short-vs-medium amount spread.

signal_pool.interpretation: higher intraday range efficiency as a path-quality mechanism distinct from directional range share and simple close-location

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This measures directional efficiency per unit range rather than directional range share across up sessions.

discovery_contract.aggregation_rule: none; this round explicitly forbids combining signals
discovery_contract.missing_data_rule: score nulls are allowed and must be preserved for audit; no imputation or cross-signal fallback is allowed

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, same TopK=10 width, and same v18 top-15 refresh hysteresis
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same v18 refreshed-portfolio implementation until any later family round explicitly changes it

promotion_rule.phase_gate: Only atomic signals that show directionally coherent positive edge in signal-edge diagnostics may advance into a later composability-screening round.
promotion_rule.non_promotion_rule: Alias-like variants, inverted duplicates, or signals whose top slice remains weaker than rank11_20 should be rejected rather than rescued by later overlay or family tweaks.

composability_hard_gate_reference.rule: if reference - screen > 0.10 then promotion is blocked

disallowed_changes: Do not mix multiple raw signals into one candidate inside this round.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change the frozen v18 refresh hysteresis rule.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not add extraction, weight-penalty, turnover-suppression, stability-cap, overlay, or family-composition changes inside this round.
Do not import or depend on the neighboring qlib data adapter layer; this project must implement all candidate fields independently on its own data contracts.
notes: This round is intentionally reduced to six signals and explicitly prioritizes mechanisms with better odds of passing composability head-stability checks.
The objective is no longer just to find standalone-positive signals, but to find signals that can survive composability hard-gate promotion logic.
